questions.question: What enzyme is responsible for unwinding the DNA double helix structure ahead of the replication fork?
Which nitrogenous base is found in RNA molecules but is completely absent in DNA?
What process describes the synthesis of an RNA molecule from a DNA template within the nucleus?
If a genetic cross involves two individuals heterozygous for a single trait (Aa x Aa), what is the expected phenotypic ratio of the offspring assuming complete dominance?
What is the functional term for a three-nucleotide sequence on messenger RNA (mRNA) that codes for a specific amino acid?
Which structures located at the ends of eukaryotic chromosomes consist of repetitive DNA sequences that protect chromosomes from degradation?
What type of mutation occurs when a single nucleotide change results in a codon that specifies a completely different amino acid?
What are the non-coding segments of a pre-mRNA transcript that are spliced out and removed before translation occurs?
Which molecular biology technique uses thermal cycling to amplify a single or few copies of a piece of DNA across several orders of magnitude?
Who are the two scientists credited with discovering and describing the double-helix structure of DNA in 1953?
